---
title: "Team"
description: "The people behind EpiAware."
toc: false
---

EpiAware is built by a small, growing group. We list active maintainers here,
linked to their GitHub profiles; the wider set of contributors to each package
is credited in that package's repository.

::: {.team-grid}
::: {.team-card}
[![](https://github.com/seabbs.png?size=200){fig-alt="Sam Abbott"}](https://github.com/seabbs)

::: {.name}
[Sam Abbott](https://github.com/seabbs)
:::
::: {.role}
Maintainer · [LSHTM](https://www.lshtm.ac.uk/aboutus/people/abbott.sam)
:::
:::
:::

## Contributors

Every merged contribution is credited in the repository it lands in — see the
contributor lists across the [EpiAware repositories](https://github.com/EpiAware).
We would like this page to grow. If you have been contributing and would like to
be listed here, say so on the [forum](https://community.epinowcast.org/) or open
a pull request.

Want to join in? See [Get involved](get-involved.qmd).
